narrative_beat: Wide familia em sala pequena, pai com rosto nas maos, TV P&B com futebol

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a Brazilian family in a small living room: father seated on a worn red fabric sofa with his face buried in his hands, mother standing behind with hand on his shoulder, young son watching from doorway
subject.focal_point: the father's hands covering his face in despair
subject.secondary: An old CRT television broadcasting a football match in monochrome. Single warm lamp illuminating the scene.
props: old CRT TV showing football in P&B

environment.location: a small Brazilian lower-middle-class living room

composition.foreground: father on red sofa and warm lamp in rich crimson and amber
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white walls, CRT TV glow, doorway

lighting.key_light: single warm table lamp from left
lighting.fill_light: cold CRT TV glow from right
lighting.rim_light: faint warm edge on mother's hand

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the human cost of gambling — the family destroyed
symbolism.secondary: football on TV as the instrument of ruin

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
